summary: Comprehensive testing of Soxial Commons Next.js + FastAPI rebuild. All 20 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI is fully functional with all major flows working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Enter button has data-testid='nav-login-btn' not 'nav-enter-btn'. Minor naming inconsistency vs review request which references 'Enter button'.

issues: Overall design looks clean and on-brand. Dark glassmorphism nav, amber accents, flat post feed all render correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: FRONTEND_URL has a hardcoded fallback 'http://localhost:3000' which is fine for dev but should come from env in production
server.py: on_event('startup') is deprecated in newer FastAPI; should use lifespan context manager
CommentTree.tsx: Steelman button data-testid is `steelman-btn-${comment.id}` (not 'steelman-btn') - correct pattern for multiple comments
compose/page.tsx is 443 lines - consider splitting into smaller components for maintainability
test_credentials: Anonymous only - click Enter button to create ephemeral session with auto-generated pseudonym (e.g. 'rare-matrix-5129')
seed_data_creation: Seed data created via TEST_ prefixed post during testing. Backend auto-seeds 10 posts + 3 comments on first startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints verified. Frontend flows tested: Enter/login, pseudonym display, post feed, sort tabs, community pages, post detail, comment submission, vote reveal (hidden until voted), compose page (shows login prompt when unauthenticated, full form when authenticated). Steelman button testid pattern is `steelman-btn-${comment.id}`. Backend URL: https://674e33b3-f6ac-4f0c-9ab0-76420ca93d84.preview.emergentagent.com
